title: Epigram On Hearing Of The Burning Of Moscow
content:
May European Liberty
    In Moscow's flames her torch relume!
        And Gallic Tyranny
    In Moscow's ruins find a tomb!

        *     *     *     *     *

    Locke says the soul may slumber;
    Lavater says the soul is seen
        Reflected in the mien;
        The last assertion true,
        Proofs of the first we view
        In faces without number.
meaning:
Thomas Oldham's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epigram On Hearing Of The Burning Of Moscow"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
